observed_problem: Repeated user correction: 'the /go sequence is too long to discover from the SKILL.md table of contents — new sessions ask the same set of orientation questions before they start a run.'
evidence: transcript excerpt 2026-07-08: 'where do I find the done_when rule?'
transcript excerpt 2026-07-09: 'is there a quick reference for execution_tier?'
frequency: observed 4 times across the last 6 /go invocations
proposed_change: Add a 'Quick reference' section near the top of SKILL.md with execution_tier table, done_when rule, and the completion-token list. Mirror the table that already exists in references/improvement-candidate-contract.md.
expected_benefit: Reduce orientation questions per session by an estimated 1-2 turns; surface /go's contract vocabulary earlier.
failure_mode_prevented: New sessions re-discovering /go's contract from the bottom of a long SKILL.md.
falsification_condition: If orientation-question frequency is unchanged over the next 20 /go invocations after the doc edit, the fix did not land.

promotion_requirements.evidence_basis: User-report frequency is the only evidence; needs corroboration from another session before /docs work.

items.description: Director confirms the doc change is in scope.
